name: Pumpkin Spice Cake#1
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift flour, baking powder, baking soda, and seasonings together.
2. Cream shortening with white sugar and brown sugar until creamy.
3. Add egg and egg yolks, beating well after each addition.
4. Mix in the sifted flour mixture alternately with buttermilk, beginning and ending with the flour.
5. Stir in pumpkin puree and chopped nuts.
6. Divide batter evenly between two greased 8-inch cake pans.
7. Bake at 350°F for 30-35 minutes.
8. Frost with any icing of your choice.
